items.title: Silver: Inventory coverage story builds – TD Securities
items.summary: TD Securities’ Daniel Ghali notes persistent Chinese demand has kept the Shanghai arbitrage window open, supporting international Silver buying. Despite strong physical flows and CME warehouse draws, visible stocks remai

items.title: Gold holds near $5,000 as Oil-driven inflation risks cap upside
items.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) trades broadly flat on Monday after reversing intraday losses as the US Dollar (USD) eases following its recent rally.
items.title_ko: 석유 중심의 인플레이션은 상한선을 상향 조정할 위험이 있으므로 금은 $ 5,000에 가깝게 유지됩니다.
items.summary_ko: 금 (XAU/USD) 은 최근 랠리 이후 미국 달러 (USD) 가 완화됨에 따라 일중 손실을 반전한 후 월요일에 광범위하게 평평하게 거래됩니다.
